Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Oops, this is a master patch, will leave +2 for Oleg. 

Alexandre, it is possible to teferemce an in landed patch during a backport:

 Lustre-change: "short Gerrit URL of patch"
 Lustre-commit: TBD (from "commit hash of unlanded patch")

By putting the commit gas of the unksnded patch, it is possible to later verify if significant changes were made to the master patch after the backported patch was landed.
Topic 631-rc1 removed
Topic set to 2.16-rc1

commit.subject: LU-17685 tests: skip nocompr test for older versions
commit.message:
LU-17685 tests: skip nocompr test for older versions

nocompr flag in lfs mirror extend is supported
after MDS version v2_15_61-245-g37e1316050

Fixes: 37e1316050 ("LU-17685 utils: Allow nocompr flag in lfs mirror extend")
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-flr env=ONLY="205a 205b"
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-flr env=ONLY="205a 205b"
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-flr env=ONLY="205a 205b"
Signed-off-by: Alexandre Ioffe <aioffe@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I5c23e549893b9f6dbc016b79d4a6601a8320bf94
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/55816

Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
